data.title: Encryption
data.description: All data is encrypted both at rest and in transit, using strong cryptographic protocols.
data.technical_spec: AES-256; TLS/SSL for data in transit; Encrypted storage

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Advanced DDoS defense systems to mitigate attacks and maintain service availability.
data.technical_spec: DDoS protection; Network firewalls; Traffic filtering

data.title: Threat Detection
data.description: Continuous monitoring for potential threats using AI and machine learning techniques.
data.technical_spec: AI/ML-based threat detection; Security Information and Event Management (SIEM)

data.title: Access Control
data.description: Strict access control measures and multi-factor authentication for internal systems.
data.technical_spec: Multi-factor authentication; Role-based access control; OAuth

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits and penetration testing to identify and remediate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration testing; Vulnerability scanning; Regular security reviews
